$comment: scripts/BillsHouse.asm — the real Bill, FULLY AUTHORED (wave C): the one-time S.S.TICKET (give_item's full-bag abort leaves GOT_SS_TICKET unset so he re-offers — pokered's GiveItem .BagFull), then the cruise-ship pointer either way.

then.text:
BILL: Yeehah!
Thanks, bud! I
owe you one! I've got to thank
you... Oh here,
maybe this'll do.

commands.text:
That cruise ship,
S.S.ANNE, is in
VERMILION CITY. They invited me to
their party, but I
can't stand fancy
do's. Why don't
you go instead of
me?
